old_value: {"id":"clawtask-jef.3","title":"BUG: API sign-out (POST /api/auth/sign-out) returns 500 and fails to invalidate session","description":"POST /api/auth/sign-out returns HTTP 500 with an empty body. The session remains valid after the call. The form-based sign-out works correctly. Root cause: the route in worker.ts passes the request to better-auth, which returns a 500 response (not an exception). The try/catch only handles thrown exceptions.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:45:51Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:45:51Z"}

{"id":"clawtask-jef.3","title":"BUG: API sign-out (POST /api/auth/sign-out) returns 500 and fails to invalidate session","description":"POST /api/auth/sign-out returns HTTP 500 with an empty body. The session remains valid after the call. The form-based sign-out works correctly. Root cause: the route in worker.ts passes the request to better-auth, which returns a 500 response (not an exception). The try/catch only handles thrown exceptions.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:45:51Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:54:01Z"}

{"id":"clawtask-jef.2","title":"BUG: auth-store.js hardcodes __Host-auth_status cookie name -- auth always false on localhost","description":"The server correctly drops the __Host- prefix on non-HTTPS localhost (setting cookie as auth_status=1), but auth-store.js checks for __Host-auth_status=1. Result: isAuthenticated is always false on localhost. Navbar always shows Sign In, dashboardGuard always redirects away from /dashboard/.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:45:49Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:45:49Z"}

{"id":"clawtask-jef.7","title":"BUG: All 404 responses return blank pages (empty body)","description":"Any non-existent URL returns HTTP 404 with Content-Length: 0 -- a blank white page. No Page Not Found message, no navigation to return to the site.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:03Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:03Z"}

{"id":"clawtask-jef.4","title":"BUG: /about/ page linked in nav but returns empty 404","description":"The About page is linked in the main navigation but returns HTTP 404 with a completely empty response body.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:45:53Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:45:53Z"}

{"id":"clawtask-jef.13","title":"BUG: handleGetSignIn ignores redirectTo for already-authenticated users","description":"When an already-authenticated user hits /auth/sign-in?redirectTo=/dashboard/, they are redirected to / unconditionally, discarding the redirectTo parameter. Compounds with the localhost auth cookie bug.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:22Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:22Z"}

{"id":"clawtask-jef.12","title":"BUG: Huge Content-Length header causes server to hang (potential DoS)","description":"Sending Content-Length: 999999999 with a small body causes the connection to time out. No request body size limit is enforced at the HTTP layer for API routes. Form-based auth handlers have MAX_BODY_BYTES=4096 but API routes do not.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:14Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:14Z"}

{"id":"clawtask-jef.11","title":"BUG: Unsupported HTTP methods return 404 instead of 405 on /api/v1/*","description":"PUT, DELETE, PATCH on /api/v1/inbox return 404 with 'Not found'. Per RFC 7231, should return 405 with an Allow header. Auth routes correctly return 405 but API routes do not.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:12Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:12Z"}

{"id":"clawtask-jef.10","title":"BUG: Error response format inconsistencies across API endpoints","description":"Four issues: (1) Action error messages duplicate the code as the message. (2) Domain errors have unhelpful messages like 'domain_error' for title_too_long. (3) 404 catch-all returns string vs standard object format. (4) better-auth validation errors use different wrapper than standard.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"david@worldsenoughstudios.com","created_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:10Z","created_by":"eykd","updated_at":"2026-03-20T19:46:10Z"}
